∇
ASSEMBLING THE CONSTELLATION

Intelligence should answer to you.

Inversion Labs is an independent research and product lab building human-governed intelligence systems.

Memory, cognition, biological signal, and AI should remain answerable to the person — not the platform. We build the architecture, the protocols, and the applications that make that real.

Where would you like to start?

The same architecture, three ways in. Pick the one that fits who you are — you can switch anytime.

Select a system to understand its role
Build with us — governed intelligence is a practice, not a product.
Explore the ecosystem Repositories Follow

Search the ecosystem

Find what connects to your question.

Controls

Explore without getting lost.

Desktop: drag to orbit · scroll for depth · select a system to inspect · Esc to return.

Museum mode — autonomous tour. Toggle with M.

Mobile: swipe to orbit · tap from the constellation or All Systems index. Systems view is the default on small screens.

What Inversion Labs is

The system already inverted. We are turning it back.

Tools built to extend intelligence became systems for extracting attention, identity, memory, labor, and agency. Inversion Labs performs the second inversion: extraction back into stewardship, passive users back into sovereign participants, fragmented data back into meaningful memory, and artificial intelligence back into a governed cognitive partner.

Inversion Labs
├─ Research & Architecture
│ ├─ CAPT — cognitive architecture
│ ├─ Knowledge Bubbles — portable provenance
│ ├─ CTP — agent transaction protocol
│ ├─ KHSB — system coordination
│ └─ FrankenCAPT — skill governance
└─ Products & Applications
├─ SynSync — state technology
├─ Human Metadata Engine — interpretive synthesis
└─ bioCAPT — embodied intelligence
└─ Practice & Evidence
├─ Inversion Excursion — field discovery
├─ Research — evidence layer
├─ Field Notes — observation practice
├─ Repositories — working evidence
└─ Documentation — architecture memory
Sovereignty over dependencyPeople should own, inspect, move, preserve, and govern their intelligence systems.
Symbiosis over replacementThe aim is not to erase the human, but to strengthen perception, agency, and understanding.
Local-first by designThe most intimate intelligence should remain closest to the person.
Proof before mythologyWe separate evidence, observation, inference, hypothesis, metaphor, and aspiration.
